column1: greytalon: I'm at work right now so I'll be playing on and off :p
greytalon: I'm at work right now so I'll be playing on and off :p
C[pathogenix: You and me both, and I'm leaving in a few minutes
C[greytalon: Haha, going for avalanche, way to make things complicated :)
C[pathogenix: :) I thought about going the other direction, but ... well ... if you're going to play a teaching game, you might as well make it worth their while
C[pathogenix: I'm off home, but I'll be back later. Enjoy your day at work :)

C[pathogenix: i do visualisation. i try to replay games that i have in progress in my head. I'm doing the right things i think, it's just frustrating sometimes :) i went from 30k to 10k on dgs in 6 months and then my lack of reading ability hit me with a crunch. just takes time, i guess. everyone's wall is different.

C[greytalon: For me, replaying games vs actually predicting a move being played are two different data banks. I could replay pro games all day but (before) if you asked me to predict a sequence and count the liberties afterwards I'd be at a loss...
C[pathogenix: I'm off to bed in a bit. nice solid game so far.
C[pathogenix: I don't think responding at the top is urgent... There are big plays left to be made there, but taking an enclosure is bigger, I think.
C[greytalon: So when will you have time to review?
greytalon: Whoops, sorry for the double post.
greytalon: Eh, nevermind. Seems as though my web client was acting weird.
greytalon: Will you be online tonight (tonight in england)
greytalon: Maybe we can do a real time game and finish the review then.
